title: Three-Phase Inverter AHO-Based VOC Tuning Rules

sections.heading: Amplitude restoration
sections.text: Tune oscillator amplitude restoration conservatively so the oscillator state converges smoothly before any outer voltage-restoration action becomes aggressive.

sections.heading: Loop ordering
sections.text: Keep the current-protection or current-inner loop faster than the oscillator envelope dynamics so current limiting clips or bounds the commanded waveform without destabilizing the oscillator.

sections.heading: Weak-grid caution
sections.text: In weak-grid mode, prefer modest oscillator forcing and damping values before increasing voltage-restoration gain, and avoid making oscillator frequency fully dependent on a fixed external angle source.
